inputs.tags:
Modern R&B, warm and heartfelt, radio-ready glow. Crisp electronic
drums, airy synth pads, rolling bassline, tight vocal stacks and
harmonies. Tender verses building to a full, soulful chorus. Clean
production, smooth male/female lead vocal, 75 BPM, key of A major.
inputs.lyrics:
"Bright Young Boy"
Written for Kayvan
(Verse 1)
Year Six and the world's wide open,
Every morning's a brand-new song.
There's a fire in the way you're hopin',
And a light that's been there all along.
(Pre-Chorus)
You chase the dogs around the yard,
Honey barks and Lily runs —
You tease 'em, but you love 'em hard,
The truest heart beneath the fun.
(Chorus)
Oh, bright young boy, you shine so true,
The whole world's lucky to be near you.
With every laugh and every joy,
You light it up — bright young boy.
(Verse 2)
Your toys are little kingdoms,
And you rule them like a king.
But the love that lives inside you
Is the most important thing.
(Pre-Chorus)
For Mum and Dad who hold you near,
For your sister by your side —
You give 'em more than words can say,
A love you'll never need to hide.
(Chorus)
Oh, bright young boy, you shine so true,
The whole world's lucky to be near you.
With every laugh and every joy,
You light it up — bright young boy.
(Bridge)
And Honey and Lily, they know it too —
There's nobody else who loves like you.
So tease 'em, chase 'em, hold 'em tight,
You're their favourite part of every night.
(Final Chorus)
Oh, bright young boy, keep shining on,
The kindest soul we've ever known.
Through every year and every joy,
Keep lighting up — bright young boy.
